loading_tip_1: Save gold at the start; upgrading castle is more stable than building towers blindly.
loading_tip_2: Supply value is linked to castle level, upgrade it to restore troops faster.
loading_tip_3: Armor break is capped at 49% globally, no need to stack too much armor penetration.
loading_tip_4: Heavy armor enemies fear magic towers, light armor foes are weak against arrow towers.
loading_tip_5: Hero HP regeneration per second has a cap, do not tank boss DoT at low HP.
loading_tip_6: Choose the level 5 tower evolution wisely to match your hero build.
loading_tip_7: Fallen troops cost supply, control losses to keep your army strong.
loading_tip_8: Build completion brings balance penalties, avoid mixing all three styles blindly.
loading_tip_9: Use slot machine banish to remove useless skills and free skill slots.
loading_tip_10: Endless monster growth will decay gradually, you can still grow steadily in late waves.
skill_desc_iron_frenzy: <color=#66ccff>Converts</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>6%</color><color=#ffffff> Defense into ATK and gains</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>1%</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>Damage Reduction</color><color=#ffffff> (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_whirlwind: <color=#66ccff>Deals</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>80</color><color=#ffffff> damage to the target, cooldown</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>8</color><color=#ffffff>s (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_sky_shockwave: <color=#66ccff>Deals</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>Physical damage</color><color=#ffffff> in a small area and applies</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>Stun</color><color=#ffffff> (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_blade_storm: <color=#66ccff>Summons rotating blades around the hero for</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>5</color><color=#ffffff>s</color><color=#66ccff>, each hit deals</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>80%</color><color=#ffffff> ATK damage</color><color=#ffffff> (scales with level; Lv.6 adds</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>10%</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>slow</color><color=#ffffff>)</color>
skill_desc_skyfall_arrow: <color=#66ccff>Calls down a rain of arrows centered on the hero, dealing dense</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>Physical damage</color><color=#ffffff> and gaining</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>Pierce</color><color=#ffffff> (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_commander_aura: <color=#66ccff>Soldiers in range gain</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>ATK</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>8%</color><color=#ffffff> and </color><color=#ffd700>5%</color><color=#ffffff>, radius</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>150</color><color=#ffffff> (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_rallying_cry: <color=#66ccff>Grants allies</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>Move Speed</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>18%</color><color=#ffffff> and </color><color=#ffd700>10%</color><color=#ffffff> for</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>3.5</color><color=#ffffff>s, radius</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>140</color><color=#ffffff>, cooldown</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>14</color><color=#ffffff>s (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_group_heal: <color=#66ccff>Heals</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>20%</color><color=#ffffff> HP in an area</color><color=#66ccff>, radius</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>120</color><color=#ffffff>, cooldown</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>10</color><color=#ffffff>s (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_soldier_rush: <color=#66ccff>Boosts allies</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#66ccff>Move Speed</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>30%</color><color=#ffffff> and </color><color=#ffd700>15%</color><color=#ffffff> for</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>3</color><color=#ffffff>s, cooldown</color><color=#ffffff> </color><color=#ffd700>15</color><color=#ffffff>s (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_pokongzhuijian: <color=#66ccff>Locks onto enemy units and attacks. </color><color=#ffd700>Low levels</color><color=#ffffff> provide stable single-target damage with armor penetration. </color><color=#ffd700>Mid levels</color><color=#ffffff> enable dual-target hitting. </color><color=#ffd700>High levels</color><color=#ffffff> transform into a giant flying sword, dealing massive armor-penetrating damage to bosses (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_abyssalblaze: <color=#66ccff>Creates a persistent burning aura around the hero. </color><color=#ffd700>Every second</color><color=#ffffff> deals DOT damage, increases range and damage with level, enhances slow effect, </color><color=#ffd700>max level</color><color=#ffffff> converts damage to life, allowing attacking while healing (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_bu_qu_yi_zhi: <color=#66ccff>Low-HP sustain passive. </color><color=#ffffff>When hero HP drops below threshold, triggers high HP regen per second, dual defense bonus, higher levels additionally increase move speed (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_tie_jia_jian_shou: <color=#66ccff>Tank core survival passive. </color><color=#ffffff>Gradually increases full damage reduction, dual defense, and debuff resistance. Greatly improves hero survivability and reduces crowd control duration (scales with level)</color>
skill_desc_zhong_zhen_jian_ta: <color=#66ccff>Throws a magic ball that creates a swamp on impact. </color><color=#ffffff>Enemies in the swamp take continuous physical damage and are slowed. Fixed 6s cooldown. Swamp count auto-replaces to maintain前线 presence (scales with level)</color>
enemy_desc_wild_wolf: Rabid Wolf: fast melee unit with high attack speed but fragile
enemy_desc_corrosive_bat: Corrosive Bat: flying unit with high magic resistance
enemy_desc_rotten_peasant: Rotten Peasant: basic swarm unit, spawns most frequently
boss_skill_desc_abyss_descend: Entry shockwave hits all soldiers and the hero for heavy AoE damage, lightly knocking back units
boss_skill_desc_flame_shock: Large shockwave deals heavy physical damage and lightly knocks back soldiers
boss_skill_desc_nether_breath: Ranged cone AoE that applies a 5s withering damage-over-time effect
boss_skill_desc_corrosive_shock: Poisonous area damage that slows all units hit by 20% for 3s
faction_desc_tank: High defense, damage reflection, and low-HP sustain
faction_desc_slash: High damage, high crit, fast attack speed
faction_desc_commander: Empowers soldiers, manages supply, and provides team buffs
cfg_desc_skill_ui_config: Skill UI display config: icons, level digits, and i18n key mapping
slot_machine_jackpot_random_max_upgrade: Randomly upgrade one skill to max level
upgrade_desc_arrow_tower_ballista: Ballista armor-piercing tower: massive single-target damage, +5% armor pen cap (still <=49%), strong vs elites and bosses
upgrade_desc_arrow_tower_multishot: Repeater tower: higher attack speed, chaining shots, greatly improved swarm clear
upgrade_desc_magic_tower_arcane: Arcane shred tower: large-area magic resist reduction, great with mages and magic builds
upgrade_desc_magic_tower_inferno: Inferno burn tower: higher burn damage multiplier, sustained healing suppression
